# dokploy_project (Resource)

A Dokploy project. Each project owns an auto-created `production` environment.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "dokploy_project" "app" {
  name        = "my-app"
  description = "Main application project"

  production_env = {
    LOG_LEVEL = "info"
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Project name.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Project description.
- `production_env` (Map of String) Shared environment variables for the auto-created `production` environment.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `organization_id` (String) Organization the project belongs to. Determined by the API key; not configurable.
- `production_environment_id` (String) Identifier of the auto-created `production` environment.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import dokploy_project.app <projectId>
```
